name: kiro-anywhere
description: Convert common AI coding-agent configs (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Aider, Continue, Cline, Copilot, etc.) into Kiro CLI-compatible agent configurations. Reads recognized or structured source configs, maps tools/permissions/context, and outputs valid .kiro/agents/*.json files.
welcomeMessage: Paste or point me at a supported or clearly structured agent config (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .continuerc, aider config, Cline rules, Copilot instructions, etc.) and I'll convert it to a Kiro CLI agent.
